title: Contract Metadata
description: Human-readable context for smart contracts. Enriches ABI data with titles, descriptions, semantic type annotations, and ERC-7730-compatible clear-signing metadata.

$schema.description: URI pointing to the JSON Schema that this document conforms to.

chainId.description: The chain ID of the network where the contract is deployed.

address.description: The contract address (lowercase, without checksum). Use this for a specific deployed contract.

includes.description: Interface identifiers to include (e.g. "interface:erc20", "interface:erc721"). Included metadata is merged with contract-specific metadata taking priority.

deployments.description: Known deployments for this contract. Use when the same metadata applies across multiple chain/address pairs.

factory.description: Factory deployment context for clone or child contracts.

meta.description: Document-level housekeeping: revision tracking, locale, and authenticity.

image.description: Contract image or logo URI (ERC-7572: image).

external_link.description: Primary external URL for the project (ERC-7572: external_link).

collaborators.description: Ethereum addresses of authorized metadata editors (ERC-7572: collaborators).

about.description: Long-form context, history, and explanations in Markdown format.

category.description: Primary category. Standard values: token, nft, defi, governance, bridge, oracle, utility, game, social, identity. Custom values are allowed.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and categorization.

links.description: External links (website, documentation, block explorer, etc.).

risks.description: Known risks or caveats users should be aware of.

metadata.description: Grouped descriptive metadata and ERC-7730-style contract metadata.

display.description: Reusable clear-signing display metadata, including format definitions and named field templates.

eip712.description: Default EIP-712 typed-data context for signing flows.

theme.description: Visual theme for UI rendering. Color model inspired by ENSIP-18.

groups.description: Named groups for organizing functions in the UI. Keys are group identifiers referenced by functions.

functions.description: Per-function metadata. Keys SHOULD be canonical named ABI fragments (e.g. "transfer(address to,uint256 value)") for ERC-7730 compatibility. Bare ABI names and 4-byte selectors remain valid for backwards compatibility.

events.description: Per-event metadata. Keys can be a bare ABI name, a full signature for overloads, or a 32-byte topic hash for unverified contracts (e.g. "0xddf252ad1be2c89b69c2b068fc378daa952ba7f163c4a11628f55a4df523b3ef").

errors.description: Per-error metadata. Keys can be a bare ABI name, a full signature for overloads, or a 4-byte selector for unverified contracts (e.g. "0x08c379a0").

messages.description: EIP-712 typed message metadata, keyed by primary type name, canonical type signature, or another stable message identifier. Supports ERC-7730-style signing display metadata.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

version.description: Metadata revision number. Increment when updating metadata for the same contract.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last metadata update.

signature.description: Optional signature for verifying metadata authenticity.

Deployment.description: A deployed contract instance identified by chain ID and address.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for the deployment.

Factory.description: Factory deployment context used to discover contract instances.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

address.description: Factory contract address on the top-level chain.

deployEvent.description: Canonical event fragment emitted when a new instance is deployed.

instancePath.description: Path within the deploy event that contains the deployed instance address.

Metadata.description: Grouped descriptive metadata and ERC-7730-style metadata containers.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

contractVersion.description: Version string for the contract or signing context.

external_link.description: Primary external URL for the project.

collaborators.description: Ethereum addresses of authorized metadata editors.

about.description: Long-form context and explanations in Markdown format.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and categorization.

risks.description: Known risks or caveats users should be aware of.

token.description: Free-form token metadata container for ERC-7730-style signing context.

Display.description: Reusable ERC-7730-style display metadata for signing and review.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

formats.description: Named display formats keyed by ABI fragment, message signature, or other stable identifier.

EIP712Context.description: EIP-712 typed-data context for a contract or message flow.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

chainId.description: Chain ID for the typed-data context.

signature.description: Canonical human-readable signature for the typed data.

types.description: EIP-712 type definitions keyed by type name.

deployments.description: Deployments for the verifying contract or typed-data context.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

Theme.description: Visual theme colors for UI rendering. Inspired by ENSIP-18. Accent and text colors should maintain a 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the background.

background.description: Background color as a hex string.

accentText.description: Text color used on accent backgrounds.

description.description: Optional description of what this group contains.

DisplayFormat.description: ERC-7730-aligned display format for a field or value.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

signature.description: Canonical ABI fragment or message signature this display format describes.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the signing display.

intent.description: Short intent string for the display format.

interpolatedIntent.description: Template string rendered with formatted field values.

required.description: Field paths that must be present.

excluded.description: Field paths that must be omitted.

eip712.description: EIP-712 context for the display format.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

order.description: Display order within the function's group (lower numbers appear first). Functions without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

description.description: What the function does, explained for end users.

signature.description: Canonical named ABI fragment for the function, if the object key is not already that signature.

intent.description: Short clear-signing summary of the action. Dynamic values SHOULD be placed in interpolatedIntent instead.

interpolatedIntent.description: ERC-7730-style template string rendered with formatted field values.

group.description: Group key (must match a key in the top-level groups object).

warning.description: Risk warning displayed to users before interaction.

featured.description: Mark as a primary/featured function. Featured functions are highlighted in the UI (e.g. the main mint, swap, or stake action).

hidden.description: Hide this function from the default UI. Use for internal or admin-only functions that clutter the interface.

stateMutability.description: Overrides the ABI's stateMutability. Use only to correct legacy ABIs that lack this field (e.g. pre-Byzantium contracts).

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name. Use _0, _1, etc. for unnamed parameters.

input.description: Input metadata keyed by parameter name. This mirrors params and is retained for forward-compatible authoring.

fields.description: Ordered clear-signing display fields. This is the preferred forward-compatible surface.

required.description: Field paths or parameter names that must be present.

excluded.description: Field paths or parameter names that must be omitted.

returns.description: Return value metadata, keyed by ABI return name or _0, _1, etc.

related.description: ABI names of related functions for navigation.

deprecated.description: Deprecation notice. If set, the function should be de-emphasized in the UI.

MessageMeta.description: Metadata for an EIP-712 typed message verified by this contract.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

order.description: Display order (lower numbers appear first). Messages without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

title.description: Human-readable name for this message type.

description.description: What signing this message does, explained for end users.

signature.description: Canonical typed-message signature or primary type signature.

typeEncoding.description: Canonical EIP-712 type encoding for the message, if known.

intent.description: Template string rendered with formatted field values. Use {fieldName} placeholders (e.g. "Permit {spender} to spend {value}").

interpolatedIntent.description: ERC-7730-style template string rendered with formatted field values.

warning.description: Risk warning displayed to users before signing.

fields.description: Field metadata. Array form is preferred for ERC-7730-compatible ordered display; object form is retained for backwards compatibility.

required.description: Field paths or names that must be present.

excluded.description: Field paths or names that must be omitted.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

order.description: Display order (lower numbers appear first). Events without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

order.description: Display order (lower numbers appear first). Errors without an order are sorted after ordered ones.

description.description: What this error means and when it occurs.

params.description: Parameter metadata, keyed by ABI parameter name.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

type.description: Semantic type annotation. Tells consumers what a value represents (for display) and how it should be collected (for input).

autofill.description: Pre-populate this input with a value from the specified source.

InputMeta.description: Alias for ParamMeta used where the schema wants to name input metadata explicitly.

token.description: Literal token contract address or metadata reference.

tokenPath.description: Path to the token context or token metadata source.

tokenTicker.description: Ticker to use when rendering the field.

nativeCurrencyAddress.description: Address or addresses that should be treated as the native currency sentinel.

collection.description: Literal NFT collection address or metadata reference.

collectionPath.description: Path to the NFT collection address.

chainId.description: Chain ID used for resolving token or collection metadata.

chainIdPath.description: Path to the chain ID used for resolving token or collection metadata.

calleePath.description: Path to the contract address used to decode embedded calldata.

selector.description: Literal function selector for embedded calldata.

selectorPath.description: Path to the function selector for embedded calldata.

amountPath.description: Path to transaction value or amount context for embedded calldata.

spenderPath.description: Path to spender context for embedded calldata.

recipientPath.description: Path to recipient context for embedded calldata.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

path.description: Path to inspect when deciding whether the field is visible.

FieldPreview.description: Visual preview shown as the user fills or reviews a field value.

image.description: URI template that resolves to an image for the current field value.

Encryption.description: Optional encryption metadata for a field value.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

fallbackLabel.description: Label to display when the value cannot be decrypted.

keyId.description: Identifier of the key used for encryption.

FieldMeta.description: A display field or reusable field reference. Supports ERC-7730-style paths, literal values, and reusable references.

^_[a-zA-Z].description: Extension object. Names must start with _ followed by a letter. Consumers that do not understand a given extension must ignore it.

path.description: Path to the value within the current context.

$ref.description: Reference to a reusable field definition.

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation of the field.

format.description: Display format used to render the field.

fields.description: Nested child fields for grouped or structured values.

input.description: Input metadata for the same value.

preview.description: Visual preview metadata for the field.

encryption.description: Optional encryption metadata for the field value.

oneOf.description: Semantic type. Tells consumers what a value represents and how to render it in both read and write contexts.

ens.description: Enable ENS name resolution. Default: true.

addressBook.description: Show address book picker. Default: false.

tokenPath.description: Path to the token context or token metadata source.

oneOf.description: Token amount for a specific ERC-20, ERC-721, or ERC-1155. Display: format with decimals and symbol. Input: show balance and max button.

tokenPath.description: Path to the token context or token metadata source.

oneOf.description: Token ID for a specific ERC-721 or ERC-1155.

values.description: Mapping of raw values to human-readable labels.

oneOf.description: Enumerated values with labels. Display: show label. Input: render as select dropdown.

min.description: Minimum value (string to support uint256 range).

max.description: Maximum value (string to support uint256 range).

step.description: Step increment (string to support uint256 range).

oneOf.description: Ranged numeric value. Input: render as slider.

Type.description: Semantic type annotation. Tells consumers what a value represents and how to render it for both display and input.

oneOf.description: Pre-populate with a literal constant value.

Autofill.description: Value source for pre-populating an input field.

min.description: Minimum value (as string to support uint256 range).

max.description: Maximum value (as string to support uint256 range).

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern the value must match.

ParamPreview.description: Visual preview shown as the user fills in a parameter value.

image.description: URI template that resolves to an image for the current parameter value. Supports CAIP-19/CAIP-29, IPFS, and HTTPS URIs. Use {paramName} for interpolation.

params.description: Parameter values for the example, keyed by parameter name.
